section.name: Guides
section.intro: Short, practical guides to the musical ideas the m-suite instruments make possible. Start with sound, learn only the theory you need, and leave able to make something.

guides.title: Microtuning with m-suite
guides.summary: Hear why two notes can both be a “major third” yet sound different, then build a tuned drone, melody, harmony, and generative line across mdrone, mkeys, mchord, and mraga.
guides.outcome: You will be able to hear cents, ratios, octaves, and beating, compare tuning systems by ear, and open the four instruments with intent.

jsonLd.description: A beginner's field guide to microtuning: hear cents, ratios, octaves, and beating, compare tuning systems, and make a tuned drone, melody, harmony, and generative line with the m-suite instruments.
jsonLd.keywords: microtuning for beginners, microtonal music, just intonation, cents, Scala tuning files, MPE, equal temperament, tuning systems
